# Issuance Conformance Suite

Runtime and source controls for WireProof issuance, AssetSeal custody issuance, and signer enrollment/signing contract integrity.

## Requirement Family Coverage

| Family | Focus | Requirements | Unique mapped checks |
| --- | --- | ---: | ---: |
| `W-*` | WireProof issuance, webhook auth, key lifecycle, rate limiting, and mint contracts. | `10` | `20` |
| `A-*` | AssetSeal minting, custody chain continuity, visibility, and append semantics. | `8` | `12` |
| `S-*` | Signer v1/v4 sign and enroll trust contracts. | `6` | `9` |
| `O-*` | Operational controls that span issuance surfaces. | `4` | `4` |

## Full Requirement Coverage

### `W-*`

WireProof issuance, webhook auth, key lifecycle, rate limiting, and mint contracts.

<details>
<summary><code>W-001</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.wireproof.auth.bearer_then_legacy` | `source` | `pass` | WireProof auth prioritizes issuer key bearer auth then legacy webhook signature fallback. |
| `runtime.wireproof.mint.signin_required` | `runtime` | `pass` | WireProof mint requires issuer auth or signed-in Pro session. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>W-002</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.wireproof.webhook.signature_required` | `source` | `pass` | WireProof webhook requires signature verification before processing requests. |
| `runtime.wireproof.webhook.signature_required` | `runtime` | `pass` | WireProof webhook rejects unsigned ingress payloads. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>W-003</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 3 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.wireproof.keys.create.pro_gate` | `source` | `pass` | WireProof issuer key creation is session and Pro-plan gated. |
| `source.wireproof.keys.create.payload_limits` | `source` | `pass` | WireProof issuer key creation enforces payload bounds with oversized body rejection. |
| `runtime.wireproof.keys.create.signin_required` | `runtime` | `pass` | WireProof key creation denies unauthenticated requests. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>W-004</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.wireproof.keys.revoke.request_contract` | `source` | `pass` | WireProof key revoke endpoint validates request body contract and ownership checks. |
| `runtime.wireproof.keys.revoke.missing_issuer_key_id` | `runtime` | `pass` | WireProof key revoke rejects missing issuer key identifiers. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>W-005</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.wireproof.keys.list.pro_gate` | `source` | `pass` | WireProof key listing is session and Pro-plan gated with no-store response headers. |
| `runtime.wireproof.keys.list.signin_required` | `runtime` | `pass` | WireProof key listing denies unauthenticated requests. |

</details>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |

</details>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |

| `source.wireproof.mint.canonical_anchor` | `source` | `pass` | WireProof mint computes canonical anchor IDs from code/pulse/claim hash and persists anchors. |

</details>

<details>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.wireproof.mint.visibility_contract` | `source` | `pass` | WireProof mint applies deterministic visibility defaults across demo, issuer-key, and session issuance. |
| `source.wireproof.auth.secret_hash_lookup` | `source` | `pass` | WireProof issuer secret lookup is hash-based, revocation aware, and updates usage telemetry. |

</details>

<details>
<summary><code>W-009</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.wireproof.mint.no_store_json` | `source` | `pass` | WireProof mint JSON response contracts disable caching for runtime issuance artifacts. |
| `source.wireproof.webhook.forwarding_contract` | `source` | `pass` | WireProof webhook forwards authenticated payloads to mint JSON path with no-store contract. |

</details>

<summary><code>W-010</code> <strong>pass</strong> | 2 mapped checks</summary>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |

| `runtime.wireproof.health.contract` | `runtime` | `pass` | WireProof health endpoint publishes operational/outage JSON contract. |

</details>

### `A-*`

AssetSeal minting, custody chain continuity, visibility, and append semantics.

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `source.assetseal.mint.session_premium_gate` | `source` | `pass` | AssetSeal mint requires session and premium access outside demo mode. |
| `runtime.assetseal.mint.signin_required` | `runtime` | `pass` | AssetSeal mint requires signed-in session outside demo mode. |

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |

</details>

</details>

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |

| Check ID | Category | Status | Description |

## Evidence Anchors

- [issuance.conformance.json](snapshots/2026-03-28/issuance.conformance.json) contains the full imported report payload.
- `requirements[]` maps standards-level requirement IDs to check IDs.
- `checks[]` contains the source and runtime assertions and their human-readable descriptions.
- `revision` identifies the current conformance revision and the number of hashed source files in scope.
- `evidence.sourceDigests[]` in the snapshot lists the referenced live source file digests.
- `history` contains the signed snapshot metadata, badge route, and history route for this suite.
